form.formComment: Last to post a big 12 len win. Hereford on April 6 over 3200m defeating Desert Halo carrying 75.5kg at $7.50 in a hurdle. Race before finished sixth of 15 runners at Huntingdon on March 11 over 3200m, 24 len behind Blues Singer with 72.5kg at $41. Tough to stop again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Made a bad mistake at the last.

form.formComment: Freshened for 32 days. Last start finished second in a small field at Fakenham on March 13 over 3200m, 16 len behind Mister Ursus with 72.5kg at $5. The start before that; finished 13th of 15 starters at Wincanton on February 25 over 4000m, 30 len behind Laughing John carrying 74kg at $17. Go close. Strong contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Freshened for 32 days. Last start finished second in a small field at Fakenham on March 13 over 3200m, 16 len behind Mister Ursus with 72.5kg at $5. form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign 2 of 11 starters at Worcester October 22 over 4000m, behind Glance Of Glory carrying 73.5kg at $7.50. When resuming last campaign 3 of 7 starters at Southwell June 3 over 3180m, 14 len behind Max Of Stars with 71.5kg at $9. Kicked off last prep with a solid third in a hurdle (3180m) at Southwell.

form.formComment: Last outing finished eighth of 9 runners at Hexham on March 25 over 3200m, on slow going 26 len behind Dee's Getaway with 68.5kg at $8.50. Before to post a big 4 len win. Doncaster on February 28 over 3300m slow going defeating The Resdev Tyke with 73kg at $3.80 in a hurdle. Definite winning chance. Likely to make amends for the last-start miss.

Likely to make amends for the last-start miss.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 5 of 10 starters at Wetherby December 26 over 3900m, slow track; 6 len behind Brookside La with 73kg at $13. Previously first up; didn't finish the race at Carlisle November 2 over 3400m. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last run won by 2.75 len Huntingdon on March 18 over 3900m defeating Supreme Shot with 71kg at $4.30 in a hurdle. Race before finished fourth of 7 runners at Huntingdon on March 1 over 3200m, 5.5 len behind Kally Des Bruyeres with 74kg at $7.50. Should measure up again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up pulled up at Catterick on February 24 over 3900m. Last start finished sixth of 8 starters at Sedgefield on March 19 over 3400m, 38 len behind Klitschko with 75.5kg at $201. Disappointing again last time and needs to do more.

form.formComment: Last outing finished sixth of 12 starters at Southwell on March 24 over 4100m, 28 len behind Dartmouth Rose carrying 74.5kg at $9. Run before finished fourth of 8 starters at Huntingdon on March 11 over 3900m, 6 len behind No No Fizz with 71.5kg at $4.50. Will be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Comes off a 53 day let-up. Last run finished fifth in a small field at Warwick on February 20 over 3800m, slow track; 35 len behind Harry Bright with 71kg at $17. Start before pulled up at Ludlow on February 4 over 4200m. Big task ahead.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after four months finished sixth of 7 starters at Sedgefield on April 1 over 3400m, 48 len behind Maple with 66kg at $34. Previously second-up finished sixth of 10 starters at Carlisle on April 19 over 3400m, 11 len behind Lady Babs with 72kg at $12. Tested at this stage of campaign.

form.formComment: Last to post a big 3.5 len win. This track on April 5 over 3300m defeating Bunker Bay carrying 67kg at $3.30 in a hurdle. Before that finished fifth of 11 starters at Carlisle on March 22 over 3400m, 9 len behind National Question carrying 67kg at $7.50. Back in form and can go back-to-back.
